---
title: "Jiawei Chen"
image: images/testbio.png
# images/disney-bio.jpg
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image-width: 12em
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: map
      text: Hong Kong
    - icon: mailbox
      text: byzcj1205@gmail.com
      href: mailto:byzcj1205@gmail.com
    - icon: github
      text: WendyCHEN1205
      href: https://github.com/Jiawei-CHEN1205
    - icon: book
      text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=KPtUwlYAAAAJ&hl=zh-CN
    - icon: fingerprint
      text: ORCID
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0001-7653-4998
    - icon: brands linkedin
      text: Linkedln
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jiawei-chen-542577250?utm_source=share&utm_campaign=share_via&utm_content=profile&utm_medium=ios_app
    # - icon: brands zhihu
    #   text: 知乎
    #   href: https://www.zhihu.com/people/arlionn/
    # - icon: brands weibo
    #   text: 微博
    #   href: https://weibo.com/arlionn
    # - icon: brands xing
    #   text: 小红书
    #   href: https://www.xiaohongshu.com/user/profile/682968d9000000000a03da1a
    # - icon: solid user
    #   text: 工作主页
    #   href: https://lingnan.sysu.edu.cn/faculty/LianYujun
    # - icon: 📝
    #   text: CV
    #   href: CV.pdf  
---

::: {#hero-heading}

## About me

Hello! My name is Jiawei Chen, and I am a final-year Ph.D. Candidate in Computational Intelligence at The Hong Kong Polytechnic University (PolyU), where I am fortunate to be advised by [Prof. Gangyan Xu](https://www.polyu.edu.hk/aae/people/academic-staff/dr-xu-gangyan/). My long-term research lies at the intersection of machine learning and other disciplines, with a particular focus on learning-based optimization, cooperative AI, and machine learning-driven control. The core of my work is leveraging artificial intelligence to enable decision-making and optimization for complex problems.

Specifically, during PhD, my research interests include reinforcement learning for combinatorial optimization, real-time optimization and deployment in healthcare and emergency scenarios, as well as predictive control and energy optimization in energy systems. In the future, I am passionate about developing innovative AI-driven solutions to address challenging decision-making and optimization tasks across various domains.


## Background

- Sep 2022 - Present: Ph.D. Candidate in Computational Intelligence, [The Hong Kong Polytechnic University](https://www.polyu.edu.hk/en/), Hong Kong, China.
- Sep 2018 - Aug 2022: Bachelor of Engineering in Automation, [Harbin Institute of Technology, Shenzhen](http://en.hitsz.edu.cn/), China.

## News

- I am currently on the academic job market and actively seeking Post-doc, Lecturer, or Assistant Professor opportunities beginning in September 2026 or later. Please feel free to contact me if you are aware of suitable positions or potential collaborations.
- Feb 2026 [Research] I will go to McGill University in Canada for a research visit, @ [HMTS Lab](https://www.jbyu.net/) with [Prof. Jiangbo Yu](https://www.mcgill.ca/civil/jiangbo-yu).
- Dec 2025 [Research] I give a poster presentation on 13th International Conference on Robot Intelligence Technology and Applications (RiTA 2025) in King's College London, London, United Kingdom.
- Sep 2025 [Research] Our journal paper entitled **Learning-Based Heterogeneous Autonomous Vehicles Scheduling for On-Demand Last-Mile Transportation** is accepted by *IEEE Transactions on Automation Science and Engineering!*
- July 2025 [Research] I give an oral presentation on 2025 POMS International Conference in China (POMS China), in Danzhou City, Hainan Province, China.
- July 2025 [Service] I serve as an assistant for the 28th Air Transport Research Society (ATRS) World Conference in Hong Kong, China. 
- Nov 2024 [Research] Our journal paper entitled **Cooperative Learning-Based Joint UAV and Human Courier Scheduling for Emergency Medical Delivery Service** is accepted by *IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Transportation Systems!*

:::
